title: Upon One-Ey'd Broomsted. Epig.
content:
Broomsted a lameness got by cold and beer:
    And to the bath went, to be cured there:
    His feet were helped, and left his crutch behind;
    But home returned, as he went forth, half blind.
meaning:
"Upon One-Ey'd Broomsted. Epig." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
